nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Entry point: receives POST /webhook/research with {query, search_depth, metadata}

nodes.name: Validate & Normalize Input
nodes.notes: Validates required fields, sets defaults, prevents webhook loop

nodes.name: Call Research Pipeline
nodes.notes: Calls FastAPI research endpoint. Timeout: 120s to allow full pipeline run

nodes.name: Check Pipeline Status
nodes.notes: Routes: completed → format report | partial/failed → error handler

nodes.name: Format Research Report
nodes.notes: Transforms raw pipeline output into formatted report with confidence % and verdict

nodes.name: Generate Markdown Report
nodes.notes: Generates a Markdown document suitable for Notion, Google Docs, Slack, or email

nodes.name: Return Success Response
nodes.notes: Returns the formatted report to the caller

nodes.name: Handle Partial/Error
nodes.notes: Handles partial results or failed pipeline runs

nodes.name: Return Partial Response
nodes.notes: Returns 206 Partial Content for incomplete pipeline runs
